mapper.insert: insert into sms_skd_rule (status, operator_id, operate_time, rule_name, description, dept_id) values (#{status}, #{operatorId}, #{operateTime}, #{ruleName}, #{description}, #{deptId})
mapper.select: select id, status, operator_id as operatorId, operate_time as operateTime, rule_name as ruleName, description, dept_id as deptId from sms_skd_rule where id = #{id}
select id, status, operator_id as operatorId, operate_time as operateTime, rule_name as ruleName, description, dept_id as deptId from sms_skd_rule where dept_id = #{deptId} order by operate_time desc
